name: Karryt-platform
description: Karryt - Plataforma de conexión para conductores de camionetas y camiones de carga

scripts.build:web: cd flutter_app && flutter pub get && flutter build web
scripts.build:web:user: cd flutter_app && flutter pub get && flutter build web -t lib/main_user.dart
scripts.build:web:driver: cd flutter_app && flutter pub get && flutter build web -t lib/main_driver.dart
scripts.build:web:admin: cd flutter_app && flutter pub get && flutter build web -t lib/main_admin.dart
scripts.run:user: cd flutter_app && flutter run -d chrome -t lib/main_user.dart
scripts.run:driver: cd flutter_app && flutter run -d chrome -t lib/main_driver.dart
scripts.run:admin: cd flutter_app && flutter run -d chrome -t lib/main_admin.dart
